headline: Ross Stores (ROST) Keeps Drawing Inflation Weary Shoppers As Valuation Questions Build
summary: Ross Stores (NasdaqGS:ROST) continues to draw inflation pressured shoppers to its off price stores, reinforcing its value focused retail model. Recent Wall Street commentary highlights solid operational execution at Ross Stores while flagging potential risks tied to current valuation levels. The company remains largely focused on brick and mortar sales, with limited dependence on digital channels compared with many peers. Inclusion of Ross Stores in several high profile investment portfolios...

headline: Is Ross Stores (ROST) One of Billionaire Steven Cohen’s Top 11 Dividend Stock Picks?
summary: Ross Stores, Inc. (NASDAQ:ROST) is included among Billionaire Steven Cohen’s Top 11 Dividend Stock Picks. On June 23, Wells Fargo downgraded Ross Stores, Inc. (NASDAQ:ROST) to Equal Weight from Overweight. It kept its price target unchanged at $245. The firm said the downgrade was based on valuation following the stock’s strong re-rating. The analyst noted […]
